School Event Rentals in Kentville NS

Nova Kingdom Rentals provides school fun day and field day rentals for schools in Kentville and across the Annapolis Valley — bouncy castles, combo inflatables, water slides, lawn games, Kids Foam Party, and bundled school event packages. Based in Bridgewater — setup and takedown always included. Kentville is the county seat of Kings County and the commercial hub of the Annapolis Valley. It serves a large surrounding population with active schools, community events, sports leagues, and family celebrations throughout the year.

Nova Kingdom Rentals is based in Bridgewater, Nova Scotia. Approximately 90 km from Bridgewater. Travel quoted — $0.72/km after the first 15 km. Nova Kingdom Rentals serves Kentville and the Annapolis Valley for backyard birthdays, school events, community celebrations, and larger occasions. Final travel cost confirmed with your quote.

Best For

  • School fun days
  • Field days
  • End-of-year celebrations
  • Sports day events
  • Community fundraisers

Frequently Asked Questions

Does Nova Kingdom Rentals do school events in Kentville?
Yes — school fun days and field day events are a specialty. We bring inflatables, lawn games, water slides, and foam party options to schools across the Annapolis Valley including Kentville. Contact us for a school event quote including travel from Bridgewater (90 km).
What's included in a school fun day package?
School packages typically include one or more inflatables, lawn games, and optional add-ons like Kids Foam Party or 360 Video Booth. We handle full setup and takedown, and all units meet safety and insurance standards. Contact us to build a custom school package.
Do you provide staffing for school events?
Nova Kingdom Rentals handles setup and takedown. School staff or designated adult supervisors are required to be present during inflatable use, as per our rental agreement. We confirm supervision requirements before booking.
How early should a school book for a spring or end-of-year fun day?
Spring and June fun days are our busiest period. Schools in the Valley should book 6–10 weeks in advance to secure their preferred date. Contact us early — availability fills fast for June.
